name: Fibonacci
description: Pullback model that trades with the 30 over 200 EMA bias when the normalized oscillator reaches the pullback zone and no repeat spike has printed in the last 10 bars.

trigger: Long when the 30 EMA is above the 200 EMA, the normalized oscillator is below 40, and there has not been another downside spike in the last 10 bars.
Short when the 30 EMA is below the 200 EMA, the normalized oscillator is above 60, and there has not been another upside spike in the last 10 bars.

earlyExit: Long exit when price has already printed the upside impulse that ends the pullback trade.
Short exit when price has already printed the downside impulse that ends the pullback trade.

checks.label: The 30 EMA is above the 200 EMA
No downside spike printed in the last 10 bars
The 30 EMA is below the 200 EMA
No upside spike printed in the last 10 bars
Price has already printed the upside impulse that ends the trade
Price has already printed the downside impulse that ends the trade
